signals.headline: White House Announces VP Vance to Lead In-Person Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad This Weekend | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]
signals.raw:
White House Announces VP Vance to Lead In-Person Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad This Weekend | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

The White House confirmed that **Vice President JD Vance**, alongside special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, will lead the US negotiating team for in-person peace talks with Iran, scheduled this weekend in Islamabad[1]. This announcement, made on April 14, 2026, coincid

signals.headline: Kevin Warsh's nomination as next Fed Chair confirmed amid surging inflation and rate hike speculation
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh's nomination as next Fed Chair confirmed amid surging inflation and rate hike speculation.** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

Warsh is set to succeed Jerome Powell by mid-May 2026, with his first potential action being an interest rate hike due to oil prices over $100/barrel from Middle East conflict and **annual core inflation** at 3.9% (pre-shock, pushing 3-month annualized core PCE

signals.headline: Ceasefire remains temporary and unstable, with first-round talks inconclusive on nuclear issues, Hormuz control (Iran ch
signals.raw: Ceasefire remains temporary and unstable, with first-round talks inconclusive on nuclear issues, Hormuz control (Iran choking 20% of global oil), and blockades; second round nears in next 48 hours, possibly hosted by Pakistan.[2][4][6]

signals.raw: US enforces full Iranian port blockade; Trump hints at peace talks this week, Rubio hosts Israel-Lebanon talks, but strikes continue in Lebanon and Iran threatens retaliation.[1][3][4]

signals.raw: No new confirmations, announcements, or resolutions today to shift prediction markets—focus is on looming expiration and diplomatic push to avoid escalation.[2][5][6]
